title: Ghosted items
excerpt:
Hi, 
Im facing something really weird during my api / ui tests. 
im getting all subitems from a board by board id and get a list of subitems. 
when trying updating them by change_multiple_column_value im getting success …

posts.author: Avisw (Avi Swisa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Im facing something really weird during my api / ui tests.
im getting all subitems from a board by board id and get a list of subitems.
when trying updating them by change_multiple_column_value im getting success message on each, but I can’t see some of them in the UI although I got them via api.
when trying access it by ui (paste the item id) Im getting message : This subitem is either deleted
or belongs to a deleted board/group"

how that can be happens?
note - the state for each rule is active.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Avisw,

Would you be able to please submit this form with the information about your issue, and if you can, a screen recording showing the steps you are taking and the problem?

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Avisw (Avi Swisa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday , just submitted the form as you asked.
note that I found what caused that strange behavior but still don’t understand how’s that can happens though
the subitem is active but its parent is deleted
I can see that using the api when get the subitem id with state parent.state attributes
thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Avisw,

Thank you! Don’t worry. An agent will take your case and help you find the solution

Cheers,
Matias
